When those in power turn their weapons on the people, responding to protests or the search for refuge with violence and brutality, they betray everything this country claims to stand for. No government that tears families apart, murders our fellow Americans on the streets, and further infringes on our rights can call itself a beacon of freedom. These acts are not justice but tyranny. They spread fear and division rather than build solidarity and hope. State violence, no matter what flag it wears or law it hides behind, threatens justice, liberty, and democracy for all of us, regardless of politics. We can't confuse brute force with legitimacy or silence with acceptance. When anyone’s rights are violated, and Americans are being killed on the streets, everyone’s future is at risk. If we care about freedom, we have to fight for it loudly, forcefully, and unapologetically.
Terrible things happening in America

Looking at it without any bias, I got the impression that ice should've had better communication once they disarmed the guy because the other officers may not have known he was already disarmed. That being said, imagine if it was your job to go into these areas where protesters are often violent, while you're in search of a specific violent criminal. You're tired, you're stressed and don't have time to mess around with people brainwashed by mainstream media that's constantly inciting more violence. Then while trying to clear people out of the street and they resist, things escalate because and a guy with a gun, comes in close and starts aggressively handling someone and pushing an agents arm (assault)... I get that it's an open carry state, but who in their right mind, would put themselves in a situation like this, without a clue that it could go wrong? If democrats and the left wing media weren't constantly pushing the narrative to stand up and fight ice, most of these protesters would be letting our federal law enforcement capture the violent criminals they set out to catch (for our safety). Also, if the biden and harris administration hadn't welcomed millions of unvetted people which inevitably and factually, brought in thousands of violent criminals and sex offenders, who've already raped and killed dozens of young women/children, followed with democrats all of a sudden, not helping to remove illegals, we wouldn't have the need for ice to be hunting them down. Obama and clinton, each deported many more illegals and democrats helped them. But now, just because of their hatred for trump, they refuse to help protect civilians from the violent illegals. I wish we didn't have ice patrolling cities but 100% of the blame, falls on every democrat that protects illegals.
